retry_reason: If the candidate is NULL, no reference is taken; retrying may succeed if a new candidate is later set, but the wrapper does not guarantee this and the caller is expected to check the return value and decide.
contract_summary: This function safely acquires an additional reference (via kref_get) on the last_bonding_candidate of a batadv_orig_node, under the protection of neigh_list_lock. It returns a pointer to the candidate with an incremented refcount, or NULL if no candidate is set. The caller must release the reference with a corresponding batadv_orig_ifinfo_put when finished. The function does not create a new object; it only exposes an existing one with a borrowed reference that must be properly returned.
